## exampleIfElse (fn)

1. If `x` is greater than `10`, calling `console.log` with `"greater"`. Otherwise, If `x` equals `10`, calling `console.log` with `"equal"`. Otherwise, calling `console.log` with `"less"`

## exampleLoops (fn)

1. Loops with let i = 0; while i < 5; i++: calling `console.log` with `i`
2. Assigns `0` to `j`
3. Loops while `j < 5`: increments `j`
4. Iterates over each `k` in `[1, 2, 3]`, calling `console.log` with `k`

## exampleSwitch (fn)

1. Based on `val`: case "A": calling `console.log` with `"A"`; `break;`, case "B": Returns `1`, default: Throws a `Error` with message `"unknown"`
